updateRestart.message: A new update has been downloaded. Restart the app to apply it.

device.title: Registered device detected
device.description: This device is registered in the backend. Once enabled, it can use device login, or you can switch to user login.
device.unavailable: This device cannot log in yet. Wait for backend approval or check that a store is bound.
device.notReadyMessage: This device cannot log in yet. Wait for backend approval or check device status.
device.loginFailed: Device login failed. Please try again later.
device.loginUnauthorized: Device authorization has expired. Rebind this device or ask an administrator to enable it.
device.loginUnavailable: This device is unavailable. Ask an administrator to confirm its status and bound store.
device.loginTimeout:
Device login timed out. Check the server address and network connection.
Server: {{origin}}
device.loginNetwork:
Cannot reach the server for device login. Check the server address, network connection, and backend service.
Server: {{origin}}
device.lookupFailed: Device detection failed. Please use user login.
device.lookupTimeout:
Device detection timed out. Check the server address and network connection.
Server: {{origin}}
device.lookupNetwork:
Cannot reach the server to detect this device. Check the server address, network connection, and backend service.
Server: {{origin}}
device.lookupHttp: Device detection failed. Try again later or ask an administrator. Error code: {{status}}

apiHost.label: Server address
apiHost.title: Server address settings
apiHost.description: Enter only an IP or domain.
apiHost.empty: Enter a backend IP or domain.

errors.invalidCredentials: The username or password is incorrect.
errors.accountUnavailable: This account is unavailable. Ask an administrator to confirm the account status.
errors.timeout:
Login timed out before the backend responded. Check the server address and network connection.
Server: {{origin}}
errors.network:
Cannot reach the server. Check the server address, network connection, and backend service.
Server: {{origin}}
errors.server: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.http: Login failed. Try again later or ask an administrator. Error code: {{status}}
errors.locationRequired: Login requires your current precise location. Allow location access and try again.
errors.default: Login failed. Please try again later.
